div.div:
AwsSreAgent (agent.py)
Reasoning Loop — up to N steps
• parse envelope → thought / tool_call / final_answer
• injects conversation memory
• computes confidence score

HistoryStore (persistence.py)
• record_chat() — runs, steps, metrics
• get_overview() — paginated analytics
• get_conversation_turns() — memory
• connection pool (5+10, recycle 30 min)
